name: CurvedDimensionOrthogonal
summary: The CurvedDimensionOrthogonal class defines a curved dimension with orthogonal reference lines.

constructors.name: CurvedDimensionOrthogonal
constructors.signature: public CurvedDimensionOrthogonal(ViewBase View, Point ArcPoint1, Point ArcPoint2, Point ArcPoint3, Point StartPoint, Point EndPoint, double Distance)
constructors.summary: Creates a new curved dimension with orthogonal reference lines using default attributes.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint1
params.doc: The first arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint2
params.doc: The second arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint3
params.doc: The third arc point to be used.

params.name: StartPoint
params.doc: The start point to be used.

params.name: EndPoint
params.doc: The end point to be used.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance in paper millimeters.

constructors.name: CurvedDimensionOrthogonal
constructors.signature: public CurvedDimensionOrthogonal(ViewBase View, Point ArcPoint1, Point ArcPoint2, Point ArcPoint3, Point StartPoint, Point EndPoint, double Distance, CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal.CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonalAttributes Attributes)
constructors.summary: Creates a new curved dimension with orthogonal reference lines.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint1
params.doc: The first arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint2
params.doc: The second arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint3
params.doc: The third arc point to be used.

params.name: StartPoint
params.doc: The start point to be used.

params.name: EndPoint
params.doc: The end point to be used.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance in paper millimeters.

params.name: Attributes
params.doc: The attributes to be applied.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.doc: The name of the property to be gotten.

params.name: Value
params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.
